summary: Reject negative durations in parseSince (they silently inverted the lookback window to a future cutoff) and cap the first-run inbox scan at 200 trends instead of dumping the whole corpus.
reason: Both flagged by Greptile on PR #548 as edge-case correctness/UX bugs: --since -7d returned empty results without an error, and a first inbox run on a freshly synced sitemap (hundreds of thousands of rows) would stream the entire corpus.
